meaning: n.康沃尔(英格兰郡名,加拿大城市名)
examples: The fishing boat had been grounded on rocks off the coast of Cornwall.
Three days later, a hurricane hit the coast near Cornwall.
Vegetables in Cornwall ripen as much as a month earlier than flowers.
It has been a starry month for Cornwall and Devon Mining Landscape World Heritage Site.
The substantial remains are a testimony to the contribution Cornwall and West Devon made to the Industrial Revolution.
